name: Banana Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift dry ingredients together into a mixing bowl. Make a well in the center.
2. Add salad oil, egg yolks, water, bananas, and vanilla to the well. Beat until smooth.
3. In a large mixing bowl, put egg whites and cream of tartar. Whip until very stiff; do not underbeat (they should be stiffer than for angel food or meringue).
4. Gradually pour the cake batter over the whipped whites. Gently fold until the two mixtures are blended; do not stir.
5. Pour into an ungreased tube cake pan. Bake in a 325-degree oven for one hour, then increase the temperature to 350 degrees for 10 minutes until the top springs back when lightly touched.
6. Immediately turn the pan upside down and let hang in the pan until the cake is cool.
7. Remove the cake from the pan and frost with cream cheese and margarine, well combined with vanilla. Beat in sugar a little at a time until of spreading consistency.
